steps.title: Substitute x = 8 into the function
steps.content: We have $f(x) = 5x^2$ and need to find $f(8)$. Substitute $x = 8$: $$f(8) = 5(8)^2$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: Calculate $(8)^2 = 64$. Then multiply: $$f(8) = 5 \cdot 64 = 320$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
